title: Important Update on Enterprise Plan Pricing

posts.author: evesartsit (Ahmed Alsawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I wanted to bring to your attention a significant change in monday.com’s pricing for the Enterprise plan. The cost has increased from $29 to $51 per user, which is quite a jump.

This change may impact many of us who rely on monday.com for our project management needs. I encourage everyone to review their current plans and budget accordingly. If you’re considering switching plans or have any concerns about this increase, it might be worth discussing with your teams or reaching out to monday.com support for clarification.

Let’s keep each other informed and navigate this change together!

posts.author: bridieca (Bridie Castiel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ahmed,

Bridie from the Digital Communications Team here, thanks for raising this!

We’d love to look into the details of your price increase. Could you share your company name or email associated with the ENT account so we can help? You’re also welcome to reach out directly to support if you prefer not to share any information here.

Enterprise contracts with monday.com are typically customized based on each customer’s specific need, they vary widely in terms of pricing, features, and service levels, depending on factors like the number of users, usage volume, and additional services included.

As a result, comparing pricing between different accounts can be tricky, as no two Enterprise agreements are exactly the same.

Hope this helps and looking forward to hearing back from you!

posts.author: bridieca (Bridie Castiel)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Ahmed - I sent you a message!
